filename.description: Original SVG filename (e.g. 'PART1 (10).svg'). Used as the unique key per sketch. The notebook derives png_name from this by replacing '.svg' with '.png'.

period.description: Raw period string from the CSV, as entered manually. Mapped in the notebook to a full Part label and a Salubra hex color.
values: the formative years of Charles Edouard Jeanneret

content_label.description: Content category assigned manually by close reading of each sketch. Mapped to a Salubra hex color in the notebook.

Era.description: Approximate year of the sketch, entered manually by cross-referencing the drawing with surrounding captions, footnotes, and running page text in the Oeuvre Complete. Collapsed to decade bins (1910, 1920, ...) for color encoding.

move.description: Number of <path> elements in the SVG produced by the 256x256 PNG. Each path represents one vectorized stroke. Used as proxy for design move count (Suwa & Tversky, 1997).
move.method: Potrace PNG→SVG conversion, then path element count

Area Covered (Pixels).description: Count of non-white pixels on the 256x256 PNG canvas after thresholding. Proxy for occupancy / compositional density. Normalized to [0,1] in the notebook using the 2nd–98th percentile range.

derived_fields.part_label: Full period string mapped from 'period' column in the notebook (e.g. 'Part I — The Formative Years...')
derived_fields.part_color: Salubra hex color mapped from 'period' column
derived_fields.color: Salubra hex color mapped from 'content_label' column
derived_fields.era_color: Salubra hex color mapped from decade bin of 'Era' column
derived_fields.png_name: Filename with .svg replaced by .png, used to look up the sketch image
derived_fields.occ_n: Occupancy normalized to [0,1] using 2nd-98th percentile of 'Area Covered (Pixels)'
derived_fields.svgLine: Deterministic SVG of random line strokes per cell, count = f(move), alpha = f(occ_n). Generated in notebook Step 6, NOT stored in dataset.pkl
derived_fields.sketchB64: Base64-encoded WebP thumbnail of the 256x256 sketch PNG. NOT stored in dataset.pkl (too large)

color_palette.description: All hues used for Part, content label, and era encoding are drawn from LC's own Salubra palette.

limitations: content_label and era fields were assigned by a single coder; inter-rater reliability was not formally tested.
Era values are approximate for sketches without explicit captions in the Oeuvre Complete.
Sketches extracted from scanned reproductions; image quality varies across volumes.
references: Le Corbusier. Oeuvre Complete. 8 vols. Birkhauser, 1999.
Curtis, W. J. R. Le Corbusier: Ideas and Forms. Phaidon, 1986.
